docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LY. PLAINTIFF SCOTT HAUSWIRTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCILLA MARTINI IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOAN HOLSTEN, PROPERTY MANAGER. THE COURT REVIEWS THE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT AND ALLOWS MS. HOLSTEN TO REPRESENT THE DEFENDANT MS. MARTINI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAUSWIRTH, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINI, LUCILLA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINI, LUCILLA
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR JOAN HOLSTEN - DEFENDANT'S PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAUSWIRTH, SCOTT
STIPULATION TO ALLOW MATTER TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM PROPERTY MANAGER: JOAN HOLSTEN FILED BY HAUSWIRTH, SCOTT MARTINI, LUCILLA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HAUSWIRTH, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINI, LUCILLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUSWIRTH, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINI, LUCILLA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, THE PESTS CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S RENTAL PROPERTY AND DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE PEST CONTROL. ITEM VALUATION IS BASIS FOR AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINI, LUCILLA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAUSWIRTH, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINI, LUCILLA
